title: Add Guided Extreme Emotional Mental States to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Roll for emotional damage
gist.blurb: Someone built an LLM-powered game master that generates narrative, UI, and psychological profiles on the fly. We added it to the showcase. Good luck in there.
gist.summary: Added 'Guided Extreme Emotional Mental States' to the community app showcase, a game that uses an LLM as a dynamic game master.
gist.impact: Players can explore seven different game modes where the narrative and UI are generated turn-by-turn.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces an LLM-based game master app. Visuals should represent tabletop gaming or text-adventure gaming. Polly the bee playing a game with the Monitor Robot acting as the Game Master.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, rolling a 20-sided die on a wooden table. Across the table, a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head acts as the game master, its screen glowing lime green (#ecf874) with retro text. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
